# Job: CRM_voucher _SMS_validation

**Enabled:** Yes  
**Description:** No description available.

flowchart LR

## Steps

### Step 1: hourly
**Subsystem:** TSQL  

```sql
select cast(v.SerializedNumber as nvarchar) as SerializedNumber, cl.reference_no as reference_no   into #x  from  [PAPAMART].[dw].[dbo].[SerializedVoucher] v   left join [bedrockdb01].[auditworks].[dbo].[cust_liability] cl on cast(v.SerializedNumber as nvarchar) = cl.reference_no   where cast(v.InsertDate as date) = cast(getdate() as date)  and datediff(hh, v.InsertDate, getdate()) > 3  and cl.reference_no is null   and (isnumeric(CUstomerNumber) = 1 or CustomerNumber is null or CustomerNumber = '')  and v.SerializedNumber not in
```
